questions.question: Which temperate forest mammal is threatened by habitat loss and human development but is not currently endangered?
questions.correct_feedback: Black bears lose habitat due to urban expansion but populations remain stable in many regions.

questions.question: Which temperate forest reptile is considered vulnerable due to habitat fragmentation and road mortality?
questions.correct_feedback: Eastern box turtles are slow moving and often killed by cars while crossing roads.

questions.question: Which adaptable forest predator is affected by habitat loss but can survive near human environments?
questions.correct_feedback: Red foxes can live near cities but still face threats from habitat changes and human conflict.

questions.question: What is a major threat to Eastern box turtle populations?
questions.correct_feedback: Many turtles are killed by vehicles and lose habitat due to development.

questions.question: Why are black bears increasingly coming into contact with humans?

options.A: Habitat loss and search for food

questions.correct_feedback: As forests shrink bears search for food in human areas leading to conflict.
